field_of_view_deg: Top lens: 220 pan/10 tilt, 110 diagonal/96 horizontal/54 vertical optical; Bottom lens: 324 pan/90 tilt, 60 diagonal/52 horizontal/28 vertical optical

power.method: Rechargeable battery (10,400mAh); kit includes 8W solar panel; DC 5V/2A adapter (sold separately)

features: dual-lens pan/tilt battery camera kit, independently aimable, near-identical sibling to HB90 Dual Kit
top lens 2.8mm wide + bottom lens 6mm tele, both F1.2
no officially confirmed RTSP/ONVIF -- official docs list only 'EZVIZ Cloud Proprietary Protocol'
